profile_text:
Tariq Al-Sayed — Director of Engineering, Platform Group, M42. 12 years at M42 and predecessors, before that 8 years at Microsoft and Amazon. Based in Abu Dhabi, originally from Amman.

Currently leading the cloud migration programme and the platform standardisation initiative across our four OpCos. Have 3 direct reports (Senior Eng Managers) and ~40 engineers total in the group.

Interests: large-scale distributed systems, cost optimisation at hyperscale, building strong engineering culture in regional context. I write occasionally about engineering leadership.

Looking to expand my network in two directions: (1) other senior engineering leaders at G42 sister companies working on similar platform problems — I think we could share war stories and avoid reinventing wheels; (2) emerging engineering leaders inside M42 who want to think about scaling teams and platforms — I have things to share and also things I want to learn from the next generation.

Speak English and Arabic fluently.
